understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by getting all goal tiles marked '+' occupied by selectable pieces at the same time; when every '+' is covered simultaneously the level reports WIN, and clearing all levels completes the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used MOVE_* actions to shift the currently selected piece in 3-pixel grid increments, with moves sometimes failing when blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects. Some adjacent objects can be pushed if immediately next to the selected piece in the movement direction, causing both to shift together (unless blocked). Walls generally prevent movement but can have non-uniform behavior, so a direction marked blocked is only a hint and still may be worth testing. If multiple selectable pieces exist, control switches via CLICK on the other piece's exact pixel coordinates; clicking an empty or invalid coordinate has no effect.
